NOT REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION 304, FINAL APPROVAL HEARING HELD ON JUN-03-2026 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT 304. THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFER. IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING, THE COURT CIRCULATED TENTATIVE RULING TO THE PARTIES REQUSTING ADDITIONAL SUPPLEMENTAL INFORMATION RE EMAIL NOTIFICATIONS AND WORK WEEK DISPUTES. THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JUN-03-2026 BY ETHAN P. SCHULMAN PENDING AN UPDATED DECLARATION FROM THE SETTLEMENT ADMINISTRATOR REGARDING THE TWO ABOVE-MENTIONED ISSUES. THE COURT WILL ESTABLISH A FUTURE STATUS CONFERENCE DATE SOMETIME IN 2027. JUDGE ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK EDWARD SANTOS; DEPT 304.
